intents.label: Review only
intents.description: The user wants to inspect, review, understand, summarize, or validate only the workbook structure/content without deciding whether it is ready for ingestion, mapping columns, staging records, comparing database changes, or publishing.

intents.label: Mapping readiness
intents.description: The user wants workbook review plus PMO schema fit, mapping preparation, or column alignment only. This intent answers whether columns can be mapped, but it does not answer whether the file is ready for ingestion, what will be skipped, or what records will be created or updated.

intents.label: Stage and preview
intents.description: The user wants to check ingestion readiness, determine whether the file is ready/suitable/valid/importable/ingestible, identify missing or extra data, see skipped/failed rows, normalize/stage records, or preview created/updated/overwritten database changes without explicitly publishing.

intents.label: Publish after approval
intents.description: The user explicitly wants to publish, apply, commit, sync, update canonical PMO data, or otherwise write approved changes to target tables.
